title: Fix `randomize local::` giving false outside error

features.name: local qualifier in randomize with from task method
features.description: Code should include a task method that calls randomize() with a constraint using local:: qualifier to reference a method argument

features.name: randomize with local referencing method argument
features.description: Code should include a randomize() with constraint that uses local:: to reference a task/method argument rather than a class property

features.name: parameterized class with randomize and local
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class containing a task that uses randomize() with local:: referencing the task parameter
